text_block_list.text: I'm waiting for Sky to show up so we can start training, but...
Chatter, chatter...

Maybe it's because the academy's big Tracen Meet is coming up, but
the track is jam-packed with students.

I can already see Sky skipping practice with an excuse like, "There's
no point if I can't run my best."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, hello!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's a fine day for training! I'm practically shaking with excitement at
the thought of running!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa, your trainee came all the way here and that's your reaction? Now I'm sad... I thought you'd be happy.
choice_data_list: I totally thought you would skip today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nah, even I wouldn't skip training with our next race coming up so
soon.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Actually, I'm feeling great today! I'm itching for a good run!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And with that, I'm off to get started! Oh, and before I forget...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Keep your eyes on me, okay? I'm expecting a nice reward for my
efforts.
True to her word, Sky sprints toward the track energetically.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey hey, got a minute?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The track's real crowded today, so you mind if I join you for some
running?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Sure, no problem. Finding a spot today can be pretty rough, after all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay, next—ah.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. Do you mind if I join you until another spot opens up?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I guess that's fine. Let's get running, then.

The usually secretive Sky is going up to others and joining them for
partner running out of her own volition.

What's more, everyone she's gone up to are also her opponents in her
upcoming race.
Wait... is she running with them to gather intel? Then...
choice_data_list: There's something I should be doing, too!
There's something I should be doing, too!

text_block_list.text:
Not wanting Sky's efforts to go in vain, I decide to put in my own
share of hard work as well.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whew... How did I do in today's training? I'd say I did pretty well
considering how crowded it was, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, it'd be nice if I got rewarded for my hard work. Maybe some
time... right about now.
choice_data_list: Nice work out there. Here's your reward.
Nice work out there. Here's your reward.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oooh, what are these notes? Let's see here...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"The first person you ran with is easily swayed by her emotions and
has a bad habit of getting rushed."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"The second person isn't good at running when someone is marking
her from behind."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I see, I see. You did well preparing this reward for me while I
was running.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yup, it's perfect. Nobody gets me like you do.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to this reward, our bond has leveled up again.
Da-dada-daaah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I might be able to reel in the big one at my next race...
Just kidding.

Seemingly satisfied with my present, Sky continues to swipe back and
forth through my notes.
